title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Hay Fever
description: Eucalyptus globulus tinctures contains cineole, a bioactive constituent that helps relieve hay fever symptoms. Cineole has natural anti-inflammatory properties that reduce swelling and congestion in the nasal passages. It also has a natural decongestant effect, which helps to clear mucus and open up airways. The expectorant properties of cineole help to thin and clear mucus, making it easier to breathe. The tincture's ability to reduce inflammation and open up airways makes it a popula...
